gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/573)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/573)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ

text: قَالَ وَ الْبَيْتُ غَاصٌّ بِأَهْلِهِ اعْلَمُوا أَنَّهُ لَيْسَ مِنَّا مَنْ لَمْ يُحْسِنْ مُجَاوَرَةَ مَنْ جَاوَرَهُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Abu Abdullah, from Ismail bin Mihran, from Muhamad Bin Hafs, from Abu Al Rabi’e Al Shamy,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said, and the room was full with his<sup>asws</sup> family members: ‘Know, that he is not from us<sup>asws</sup>, the one is not of good neighbourliness with the ones who are in his neighbourhood’.
en.sarwar: 10. Abu Ali al-Ash’ari has narrated from al-Hassan ibn Ali al-Kufi from ‘Uthman bays ibn Hisham from Mu’awiyah ibn ‘Ammar from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah has said, ‘Maintaining good neighborly relations develops the country and extends one’s lifespan.”
